zh.lifeSummary: Richard Barttelot是Robert Barttelot和Mrs Robert Barttelot的兒子，於1216年出生在英國英格蘭素可斯托福哈姆。他於1236年與Alicia De Preston Barttellot在英國結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1260年在他的家鄉享年44歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭韋斯特 素可斯托福哈姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Richard Barttelot是Robert Barttelot和Mrs Robert Barttelot的儿子，于1216年出生在英国英格兰素可斯托福哈姆。他于1236年与Alicia De Preston Barttellot在英国结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1260年在他的家乡享年44岁，埋葬在英国英格兰韋斯特 素可斯托福哈姆。

nameMeanings.name: Barttelot
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Bartlett
meanings: English: from the Middle English and Old French personal name Bertelot, Bartelot (with the Old French double diminutive suffix -elot), a pet form of Bartholomew .

History: This is the name of a well-established New England family. Its members include Josiah Bartlett (1729–95), who was born in Amesbury, MA, and became governor of NH (1790–94). A Richard Bartlet(t) settled in Newbury, MA, in 1635.

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

en.lifeSummary: Richard Barttelot was born in 1216, in Stopham, Sussex, England, United Kingdom as the son of Robert Barttelot and Mrs Robert Barttelot. He married Alicia De Preston Barttellot in 1236, in England. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died in 1260, in his hometown, at the age of 44, and was buried in Stopham, West Sussex, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Richard Barttelot est né en 1216, à Stopham, Sussex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, fils de Robert Barttelot et Mrs Robert Barttelot. Il a épousé Alicia De Preston Barttellot en 1236, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé en 1260, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 44 ans, et a été enterré à Stopham, West Sussex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ja.lifeSummary: Richard Barttelotは1216年にイギリスイギリススセックスストファムでRobert BarttelotとMrs Robert Barttelotの息子として生まれた。1236年にイギリスでAlicia De Preston Barttellotと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1260年に故郷で44歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスウエスト スセックスストファムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard Barttelot(은)는 1216년 영국 잉글랜드 수세스 스토프아에서 Robert Barttelot(와)과 Mrs Robert Barttelot의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1236년 영국에서 Alicia De Preston Barttellot(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1260년 그의 고향에서 44세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 웨스트 수세스 스토프아에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Richard Barttelot родился в 1216 г. в местности стофам, суссекс, Англия, Великобритания. Его родителей звали Robert Barttelot и Mrs Robert Barttelot. Он женился на женщине по имени Alicia De Preston Barttellot в 1236 г. в местности Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер в 1260 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 44 лет и был похоронен в местности стофам, вест суссекс, Англия, Великобритания.
